title: Sainik School Satara Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 13 TGT, Ward Boy and More Posts
post_name: TGT, Art Master, Laboratory Assistant (Physics), MO, Ward Boy / Matron (Hostel)
short_info: Sainik School Satara has published the TGT, Art Master, Laboratory Assistant (Physics), Medical Officer, and Ward Boy / Matron (Hostel) Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 13 teaching and non-teaching positions. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 50 years and holding qualifications such as Graduation with 50% marks, B.Ed, CTET/STET Paper II, MBBS, Intermediate Science, or Matriculation are eligible to apply offline at www.sainiksatara.org. The application process will be active till 01 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application form

application_fee.sc_fee: Not required to pay any application fee

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation with 50% marks, B.Ed or equivalent, CTET/STET Paper II, MBBS, Matriculation
qualification.details: TGT (Mathematics): Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks in Mathematics OR Four years Integrated B.Sc.B.Ed (PCM) of Regional College of Education of NCERT with at least 50% marks AND B.Ed or equivalent with 50% marks AND Passed CTET/STET Paper II. TGT (Hindi): Graduate in Hindi with at least 50% marks AND B.Ed or equivalent AND Passed CTET/STET Paper II. TGT (Social Science): Graduate with two subjects out of History, Political Science, Economics, Sociology, Geography with 50% marks OR Hons Graduation with History/Political Science/Geography AND B.Ed OR B.A.Ed AND Passed CTET/STET Paper II. TGT (Marathi): Graduate in Marathi with 50% marks AND B.Ed or equivalent AND Qualified CTET/State TET Paper II. Art Master: Four years Diploma in Fine Arts after Class XII OR Five years after Class X OR Degree in Fine Arts/Crafts OR B.Ed in Fine Arts from Regional College of Education. Music Teacher: Five years study in Music equivalent to Graduate/Post Graduate OR Bachelor's with Music OR Higher Secondary with Sangeet Visharad etc. Laboratory Assistant (Physics): Intermediate Science or equivalent in Physics with 50% marks. Medical Officer: MBBS degree. Ward Boy / Matron (Hostel): Matriculation or equivalent; able to converse fluently in English.

salary_details.details: TGT (Mathematics): Rs. 40,000/- per month TGT (Hindi): Rs. 40,000/- per month TGT (Social Science): Rs. 40,000/- per month TGT (Marathi): Rs. 40,000/- per month Art Master: Rs. 32,000/- per month Music Teacher: Rs. 27,000/- per month Laboratory Assistant (Physics): Rs. 25,000/- per month Medical Officer: Rs. 30,000/- per month Ward Boy / Matron (Hostel): Rs. 27,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sainiksatara.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
